subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath adorned the human reality with manifest signs of divine love, and hath illumined all existent beings
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی زین الحقیقه الانسانیه بایات باهره حبیه رحمانیه و اشرق علی الکینونات
subcodes.subjects: @composition and decomposition, @unity; oneness of humanity, @law of cause and effect, @marriage as means of spiritual progress
